text: As I stand here, I am enveloped by the glow of technological artifacts and the hum of innovation behind glass. There’s an air of anticipation—a threshold between curiosity and discovery. The world feels slightly off-kilter, as though inviting me to question the very nature of progress. This place stirs a sense of belonging to both the past and future, filling me with wonder and gentle humility as I ponder humanity’s perpetual search for meaning.
